content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 27, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 27 focused on hardening security and compliance infrastructure, improving runtime reliability, and integrating community-driven ecosystem plugins. Significant updates were made to CI/CD workflows to support SOC2 standards, alongside critical fixes for agent role management and error handling in connector configurations.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Security and Compliance Hardening**
*   Strengthened SOC2 verification controls across schemas, workflow pinning, Kubernetes workload checks, and Gitleaks scanning ([#8014](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8014)).
*   Implemented auth event retention metadata and migrations to support security auditing ([#8014](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8014)).

**Runtime and Connector Reliability**
*   Audited and fixed silent catch blocks in connector routes and trajectory internals to ensure failures are logged with structured context rather than being treated as successes ([#8013](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8013)).
*   Resolved an issue where `ensureOwnerRole` failed to apply roles because it executed before runtime worlds were populated; added a re-fire mechanism for `WORLD_JOINED`/`WORLD_CONNECTED` events ([#8003](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8003)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Agent Infrastructure:** [#8022](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8022) (Registry helper), [#8020](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8020) (Subagent grounding), [#8018](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8018) (Tool output preservation), [#8019](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8019) (Reply recovery).
*   **OS & Deployment:** [#8021](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8021) (RISC-V GUI profile), [#8017](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8017) (Desktop FFI prewarm), [#8015](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8015) (Cloud bridge networking).
*   **Plugins:** [#8016](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8016) (Add @suedeai/plugin-suede).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Community Plugin Ecosystem**
*   Integrated several community-led initiatives, including the `plugin-prflght` Solana transaction firewall ([#7938](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7938)), the `plugin-gblin` treasury management tool ([#7939](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7939)), and the AgentAudit AI compliance layer ([#7974](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7974)).

**Agent Identity and Infrastructure**
*   Closed issues related to the Agent Identity Verification dApp ([#7884](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7884)) and the Nautilus Compass long-memory/agent economy infrastructure ([#8011](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8011)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   *No new issues were opened on this date.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#7960](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7960) Planner meta-narration:** The issue involves the Planner incorrectly summarizing tool outputs instead of returning the actual data. User Rajathacharya24 has requested to be assigned to the task to implement a fix.
